narration.en: Salih ibn Aqabah and Sayf ibn Umayrah reported that Alqamah ibn Muhammad al-Hadrami asked Imam al-Baqir (as) to teach him a prayer for the day of Ashura when visiting Imam al-Husayn (as), or when unable to visit and greeting from home. The Imam taught him this form of Ziyarat, saying that one who recites it receives the reward of the angels who visit Imam al-Husayn (as), is raised one hundred million ranks with the martyrs, and receives the reward of all visitors since the day of his martyrdom.
narration.ur: صالح بن عقبہ اور سیف بن امیہ سے روایت ہے کہ علقمہ بن محمد حضرمی نے امام باقرؑ سے یوم عاشور کو امام حسینؑ کی زیارت یا گھر سے سلام بھیجنے کی دعا سیکھی۔ امامؑ نے یہ زیارت عاشورہ سکھائی اور فرمایا کہ اسے پڑھنے والے کو فرشتوں کی زیارت کا ثواب، شہداء کے درجے میں اضافہ، اور شہادت کے دن سے تمام زائرین کا ثواب ملتا ہے۔

citations.narrator: Salih ibn Aqabah → Imam al-Baqir (as) → Alqamah ibn Muhammad al-Hadrami

sections.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
sections.transliteration: bismillahi alrrahmani alrraheemi

translations.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Merciful, the Most Compassionate
In the name of Allah, the Most Merciful, the Most Compassionate

sections.arabic:
اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
السَّلاَمُ عَلَيكَ يَا خِيَرَةِ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ خَيرَتِهِ
اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
sections.transliteration:
alssalamu 'alayka ya aba 'abdillahi
alssalamu 'alayka yabna rasuli allahi
alssalamu 'alayka ya khiyarata allahi wabna khiyaratihi
alssalamu 'alayka yabna amiri almu'minina

translations.en:
Peace be upon you, O Aba-`Abdullah.
Peace be upon you, O son of Allahs Messenger.
Peace be upon you, O choicest of Allah and son of His choicest.
Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful

lines.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translations.en: Peace be upon you, O Aba-`Abdullah.

lines.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translations.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allahs Messenger.

lines.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيكَ يَا خِيَرَةِ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ خَيرَتِهِ
lines.transliteration: alssalamu 'alayka ya khiyarata allahi wabna khiyaratihi

translations.en: Peace be upon you, O choicest of Allah and son of His choicest.

lines.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translations.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful

sections.arabic:
وَٱبْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْوَصِيِّينَ
اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ
سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ وَٱلْوِتْرَ ٱلْمَوْتُورَ
sections.transliteration:
wabna sayyidi alwashiyyina
alssalamu 'alayka yabna fatimata
sayyidati nisa'i al'alamina
alssalamu 'alayka ya thara allahi wabna tharihi walwitra almawtura

translations.en:
and son of the chief of the Prophets successors.
Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah
the doyenne of the women of the worlds.
Peace be upon you, O vengeance of Allah, son of His vengeance, and the unavenged so far.
and son of the chief of the Prophets successors.
Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah
the doyenne of the women of the worlds.

lines.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ وَٱلْوِتْرَ ٱلْمَوْتُورَ
lines.transliteration: alssalamu 'alayka ya thara allahi wabna tharihi walwitra almawtura

translations.en: Peace be upon you, O vengeance of Allah, son of His vengeance, and the unavenged so far.

sections.arabic:
اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ ٱلأرْوَاحِ ٱلَّتِي حَلَّتْ بِفِنَائِكَ
عَلَيْكُمْ مِنِّي جَمِيعاً سَلاَمُ ٱللَّهِ أبَداً
مَا بَقيتُ وَبَقِيَ ٱللَّيْلُ وَٱلنَّهَارُ
يَا أبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
sections.transliteration:
alssalamu 'alayka wa 'ala al-arwahi allati hallat bifina'ika
'alaykum minni jami'an salamu allahi abadan
ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu
ya aba 'abdillahi

translations.en:
Peace be upon you and upon the souls that resided in your courtyard.
Peace of Allah be upon all of you from me forever
as long as I am existent and as long as there are day and night.
O Aba-`Abdillah,

lines.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ ٱلأرْوَاحِ ٱلَّتِي حَلَّتْ بِفِنَائِكَ
lines.transliteration: alssalamu 'alayka wa 'ala al-arwahi allati hallat bifina'ika

translations.en: Peace be upon you and upon the souls that resided in your courtyard.

lines.arabic: عَلَيْكُمْ مِنِّي جَمِيعاً سَلاَمُ ٱللَّهِ أبَداً

translations.en: Peace of Allah be upon all of you from me forever

lines.transliteration: ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu

translations.en: as long as I am existent and as long as there are day and night.
O Aba-`Abdillah,

sections.arabic:
لَقَدْ عَظُمَتِ ٱلرَّزِيَّةُ
وَجَلَّتْ وَعَظُمَتِ ٱلْمُصيبَةُ بِكَ
عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ أهْلِ ٱلإِسْلاَمِ
وَجَلَّتْ وَعَظُمَتْ مُصيبَتُكَ
sections.transliteration:
laqad 'azumat alrraziyyatu
wa jallat wa 'azumat almushibatu bika
'alayna wa 'ala jami'i ahli al-islami
wa jallat wa 'azumat mushibatuka

translations.en:
unbearable is the sorrow
and excruciating and unbearable is the misfortune of you
for us and for all the people of Islam.
Excruciating and unbearable has been your misfortune
unbearable is the sorrow
and excruciating and unbearable is the misfortune of you
for us and for all the people of Islam.
Excruciating and unbearable has been your misfortune

sections.arabic: فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ عَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ أهْلِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ
sections.transliteration: fi alssamawati 'ala jami'i ahli alssamawati

translations.en: in the heavens for all the inhabitants of the heavens.

lines.arabic: فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ عَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ أهْلِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ

translations.en: in the heavens for all the inhabitants of the heavens.

sections.arabic:
فَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً أسَّسَتْ أسَاسَ ٱلظُّلْمِ وَٱلْجَوْرِ عَلَيْكُمْ أهْلَ ٱلْبَيْتِ
وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً دَفَعَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَقَامِكُمْ
وَأزَالَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَرَاتِبِكُمُ ٱلَّتِي رَتَّبَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ فِيهَا
وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً قَتَلَتْكُمْ
sections.transliteration:
fala'ana allahu ummatan assasat asasa alzzulmi waljawri 'alaykum ahla albayti
wa la'ana allahu ummatan dafa'atkum 'an maqamikum
wa azalatkum 'an maratibikum allati rattabakum allahu fiha
wa la'ana allahu ummatan qatalatkum

translations.en:
So, may Allah curse the people who laid the basis of persecution and wronging against you, O Members of the Household.
May Allah curse the people who drove you away from your position
and removed you away from your ranks that Allah has put you in.
May Allah curse the people who slew you.

lines.arabic: فَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً أسَّسَتْ أسَاسَ ٱلظُّلْمِ وَٱلْجَوْرِ عَلَيْكُمْ أهْلَ ٱلْبَيْتِ
lines.transliteration: fala'ana allahu ummatan assasat asasa alzzulmi waljawri 'alaykum ahla albayti

translations.en: So, may Allah curse the people who laid the basis of persecution and wronging against you, O Members of the Household.

lines.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً دَفَعَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَقَامِكُمْ
lines.transliteration: wa la'ana allahu ummatan dafa'atkum 'an maqamikum

translations.en: May Allah curse the people who drove you away from your position

lines.arabic: وَأزَالَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَرَاتِبِكُمُ ٱلَّتِي رَتَّبَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ فِيهَا
lines.transliteration: wa azalatkum 'an maratibikum allati rattabakum allahu fiha

translations.en: and removed you away from your ranks that Allah has put you in.
May Allah curse the people who slew you.

sections.arabic:
وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمُمَهِّدِينَ لَهُمْ
بِٱلتَّمْكِينِ مِنْ قِتَالِكُمْ
بَرِئْتُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ وَإِلَيْكُمْ مِنْهُمْ
وَمِنْ أشْيَاعِهِمْ وَأتْبَاعِهِمْ وَأوْلِيَائِهِمْ
sections.transliteration:
wa la'ana allahu almumahhidina lahum
bilttamkini min qitalikum
bari'tu ila allahi wa ilaykum minhum
wa min ashya'ihim wa atba'ihim wa awliya'ihim

translations.en:
May Allah curse those who paved the way for them to do so
and who made possible for them to fight against you.
I repudiate them in the presence of Allah and You
and I repudiate their devotees, followers, and loyalists.
May Allah curse those who paved the way for them to do so
and who made possible for them to fight against you.

lines.transliteration: bari'tu ila allahi wa ilaykum minhum

translations.en: I repudiate them in the presence of Allah and You

lines.transliteration: wa min ashya'ihim wa atba'ihim wa awliya'ihim

translations.en: and I repudiate their devotees, followers, and loyalists.

sections.arabic:
يَا أبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
إِنِّي سِلْمٌ لِمَنْ سَالَمَكُمْ
وَحَرْبٌ لِمَنْ حَارَبَكُمْ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ
وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ آلَ زِيَادٍ وَآلَ مَرْوَانَ
sections.transliteration:
ya aba 'abdillahi
inni silmun liman salamakum
wa harbun liman harabakum ila yawmi alqiyamati
wa la'ana allahu ala ziyadin wa ala marwana

translations.en:
O Aba-`Abdullah,
I am at peace with those who are at peace with you
and I am at war against those who have fought against you up to the Resurrection Day.
May Allah also curse the family of Ziy¡d and the family of Marw¡n.
O Aba-`Abdullah,
I am at peace with those who are at peace with you

lines.arabic: وَحَرْبٌ لِمَنْ حَارَبَكُمْ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ
lines.transliteration: wa harbun liman harabakum ila yawmi alqiyamati

translations.en: and I am at war against those who have fought against you up to the Resurrection Day.

lines.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ آلَ زِيَادٍ وَآلَ مَرْوَانَ
lines.transliteration: wa la'ana allahu ala ziyadin wa ala marwana

translations.en: May Allah also curse the family of Ziy¡d and the family of Marw¡n.

sections.arabic:
وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ بَنِي أُمَيَّةَ قَاطِبَةً
وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ ٱبْنَ مَرْجَانَةَ
وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ عُمَرَ بْنَ سَعْدٍ
وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ شِمْراً
sections.transliteration:
wa la'ana allahu bani umayyata qatibatan
wa la'ana allahu ibna marjanata
wa la'ana allahu 'umara bna sa'din
wa la'ana allahu shimran

translations.en:
May Allah also curse the descendants of Umayyah altogether.
May Allah also curse the son of Marj¡nah.
May Allah also curse `Umar the son of Sa`d.
May Allah also curse Shimr.

lines.transliteration: wa la'ana allahu bani umayyata qatibatan

translations.en: May Allah also curse the descendants of Umayyah altogether.
May Allah also curse the son of Marj¡nah.
May Allah also curse `Umar the son of Sa`d.
May Allah also curse Shimr.

sections.arabic:
وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً أسْرَجَتْ وَألْجَمَتْ
وَتَنَقَّبَتْ لِقِتَالِكَ
sections.transliteration:
wa la'ana allahu ummatan asrajat wa aljamat
wa tanaqqabat liqitalika

translations.en:
May Allah also curse the people who saddled up, gave reins to their horses,
and masked their faces in preparation for fighting against you.

lines.transliteration: wa la'ana allahu ummatan asrajat wa aljamat

translations.en: May Allah also curse the people who saddled up, gave reins to their horses,
and masked their faces in preparation for fighting against you.

sections.arabic:
بِأبِي أنْتَ وَأُمِّي
لَقَدْ عَظُمَ مُصَابِي بِكَ
فَأسْألُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي أكْرَمَ مَقَامَكَ وَأكْرَمَنِي بِكَ
أنْ يَرْزُقَنِي طَلَبَ ثَأرِكَ
sections.transliteration:
bi'abi anta wa ummi
laqad 'azuma mushabi bika
fa'as'alu allaha alladhi akrama maqamaka wa akramani bika
an yarzuqani talaba tha'rika

translations.en:
May my father and mother be ransoms for you.
Extremely insufferable is my commiserations with you;
so, I beseech Allah Who has honored your position and honored me because of you
to endue me with the chance to avenge you
May my father and mother be ransoms for you.
Extremely insufferable is my commiserations with you;

lines.arabic: فَأسْألُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي أكْرَمَ مَقَامَكَ وَأكْرَمَنِي بِكَ
lines.transliteration: fa'as'alu allaha alladhi akrama maqamaka wa akramani bika

translations.en: so, I beseech Allah Who has honored your position and honored me because of you
to endue me with the chance to avenge you

sections.arabic:
مَعَ إِمَامٍ مَنْصُورٍ مِنْ أهْلِ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ
صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْنِي عِنْدَكَ وَجِيهاً
بِٱلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
sections.transliteration:
ma'a imamin manshurin min ahli bayti muhammadin
shalla allahu 'alayhi wa alihi
allahumma ij'alni 'indaka wajihan
bilhusayni 'alayhi alssalamu fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translations.en:
with a (Divinely) supported leader from the Household of Mu¦ammad,
peace of Allah be upon him and his Household.
O Allah, (please) make me illustrious in Your sight
in the name of al-°usayn, peace be upon him, in this world and in the Hereafter.

lines.arabic: مَعَ إِمَامٍ مَنْصُورٍ مِنْ أهْلِ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ
lines.transliteration: ma'a imamin manshurin min ahli bayti muhammadin

translations.en: with a (Divinely) supported leader from the Household of Mu¦ammad,
peace of Allah be upon him and his Household.
O Allah, (please) make me illustrious in Your sight

lines.arabic: بِٱلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ

translations.en: in the name of al-°usayn, peace be upon him, in this world and in the Hereafter.

sections.arabic:
يَا أبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
إِنِّي أتَقَرَّبُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ وَإِلَىٰ رَسُولِهِ
وَإِلَىٰ أمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَإِلَىٰ فَاطِمَةَ
وَإِلَىٰ ٱلْحَسَنِ وَإِلَيْكَ بِمُوَالاَتِكَ
sections.transliteration:
ya aba 'abdillahi
inni ataqarrabu ila allahi wa ila rasulihi
wa ila amiri almu'minina wa ila fatimata
wa ila alhasani wa ilayka bimuwalatika

translations.en:
O Aba-`Abdullah,
I do seek nearness to Allah, to His Messenger,
to the Commander of the Faithful, to Fatimah,
to al-Hasan, and to you by means of loyalty to you
O Aba-`Abdullah,

lines.arabic: إِنِّي أتَقَرَّبُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ وَإِلَىٰ رَسُولِهِ
lines.transliteration: inni ataqarrabu ila allahi wa ila rasulihi

translations.en: I do seek nearness to Allah, to His Messenger,

lines.transliteration: wa ila amiri almu'minina wa ila fatimata

translations.en: to the Commander of the Faithful, to Fatimah,

lines.transliteration: wa ila alhasani wa ilayka bimuwalatika

translations.en: to al-Hasan, and to you by means of loyalty to you

sections.arabic:
وَبِٱلْبَرَاءَةِ (مِمَّنْ قَاتَلَكَ
وَنَصَبَ لَكَ ٱلْحَرْبَ
وَبِٱلْبَرَاءَةِ مِمَّنْ أسَّسَ أسَاسَ ٱلظُّلْمِ وَٱلْجَوْرِ عَلَيْكُمْ
وَأبْرَأُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ وَإِلَىٰ رَسُولِهِ)
sections.transliteration:
wa bilbara'ati (mimman qatalaka
wa nashaba laka alharba
wa bilbara'ati mimman assasa asasa alzzulmi waljawri 'alaykum
wa abra'u ila allahi wa ila rasulihi)

translations.en:
and by means of repudiation of those who fought against you
and incurred your hostility,
and repudiation of those who laid the basis of persecution and wronging against you all.
I also repudiate, in the presence of Allah and His Messenger,
and by means of repudiation of those who fought against you
and incurred your hostility,

lines.arabic: وَبِٱلْبَرَاءَةِ مِمَّنْ أسَّسَ أسَاسَ ٱلظُّلْمِ وَٱلْجَوْرِ عَلَيْكُمْ
lines.transliteration: wa bilbara'ati mimman assasa asasa alzzulmi waljawri 'alaykum

translations.en: and repudiation of those who laid the basis of persecution and wronging against you all.

lines.transliteration: wa abra'u ila allahi wa ila rasulihi)

translations.en: I also repudiate, in the presence of Allah and His Messenger,

sections.arabic:
مِمَّنْ أسَّسَ أسَاسَ ذٰلِكَ
وَبَنَىٰ عَلَيْهِ بُنْيَانَهُ
وَجَرَىٰ فِي ظُلْمِهِ وَجَوْرِهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَعلىٰ أشْيَاعِكُمْ
بَرِئْتُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ وَإِلَيْكُمْ مِنْهُمْ
sections.transliteration:
mimman assasa asasa dhalika
wa bana 'alayhi bunyanahu
wa jara fi zulmihi wa jawrihi 'alaykum wa 'ala ashya'ikum
bari'tu ila allahi wa ilaykum minhum

translations.en:
those who laid the basis of all that,
established their foundations on it,
and continued in wronging and persecuting you and your adherents.
In the presence of Allah and you all do I repudiate these.
those who laid the basis of all that,
established their foundations on it,

lines.arabic: وَجَرَىٰ فِي ظُلْمِهِ وَجَوْرِهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَعلىٰ أشْيَاعِكُمْ
lines.transliteration: wa jara fi zulmihi wa jawrihi 'alaykum wa 'ala ashya'ikum

translations.en: and continued in wronging and persecuting you and your adherents.

lines.transliteration: bari'tu ila allahi wa ilaykum minhum

translations.en: In the presence of Allah and you all do I repudiate these.

sections.arabic:
وَأتَقَرَّبُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ ثُمَّ إِلَيْكُمْ
بِمُوَالاَتِكُمْ وَمُوَالاَةِ وَلِيِّكُمْ
وَبِٱلْبَرَاءَةِ مِنْ أعْدَائِكُمْ
وَٱلنَّاصِبِينَ لَكُمُ ٱلْحَرْبَ
sections.transliteration:
wa ataqarrabu ila allahi thumma ilaykum
bimuwalatikum wa muwalati waliyyikum
wa bilbara'ati min a'da'ikum
walnnashibina lakum alharba

translations.en:
And I seek nearness to Allah and then to you all
by means of declaring loyalty to you and to your loyalists
and declaring repudiation of your enemies
and those who incur animosity of you

lines.transliteration: wa ataqarrabu ila allahi thumma ilaykum

translations.en: And I seek nearness to Allah and then to you all
by means of declaring loyalty to you and to your loyalists
and declaring repudiation of your enemies
and those who incur animosity of you

sections.arabic:
وَبِٱلْبَرَاءَةِ مِنْ أشْيَاعِهِمْ وَأتْبَاعِهِمْ
إِنِّي سِلْمٌ لِمَنْ سَالَمَكُمْ
وَحَرْبٌ لِمَنْ حَارَبَكُمْ
وَوَلِيٌّ لِمَنْ وَالاَكُمْ
sections.transliteration:
wa bilbara'ati min ashya'ihim wa atba'ihim
inni silmun liman salamakum
wa harbun liman harabakum
wa waliyyun liman walakum

translations.en:
and repudiation of their adherents and followers.
I am verily at peace with those who have been at peace with you,
I am at war against those who fought against you,
loyalist to those who have been loyalist to you,

lines.transliteration: wa bilbara'ati min ashya'ihim wa atba'ihim

translations.en: and repudiation of their adherents and followers.
I am verily at peace with those who have been at peace with you,
I am at war against those who fought against you,
loyalist to those who have been loyalist to you,

sections.arabic:
وَعَدُوٌّ لِمَنْ عَادَاكُمْ
فَأسْألُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي أكْرَمَنِي بِمَعْرِفَتِكُمْ
وَمَعْرِفَةِ أوْلِيَائِكُمْ
وَرَزَقَنِيَ ٱلْبَرَاءَةَ مِنْ أعْدَائِكُمْ
sections.transliteration:
wa 'aduwwun liman 'adakum
fa'as'alu allaha alladhi akramani bima'rifatikum
wa ma'rifati awliya'ikum
wa razaqani albara'ata min a'da'ikum

translations.en:
and enemy of those who have shown enmity towards you.
So, I beseech Allah Who has endued me with the honor of recognizing you
and recognizing your loyalists
and Who conferred upon me with repudiation of your enemies,
and enemy of those who have shown enmity towards you.
So, I beseech Allah Who has endued me with the honor of recognizing you
and recognizing your loyalists
and Who conferred upon me with repudiation of your enemies,

sections.arabic:
أنْ يَجْعَلَنِي مَعَكُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
وَأنْ يُثَبِّتَ لِي عِنْدَكُمْ قَدَمَ صِدْقٍ
فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
وَأسْألُهُ أنْ يُبَلِّغَنِيَ ٱلْمَقَامَ ٱلْمَحْمُودَ لَكُمْ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ
sections.transliteration:
an yaj'alani ma'akum fi alddunya wal-akhirati
wa an yuthabbita li 'indakum qadama shidqin
fi alddunya wal-akhirati
wa as'aluhu an yuballighani almaqama almahmuda lakum 'inda allahi

translations.en:
to include me with you in this world and in the Hereafter
and to make firm step of honesty for me with you
in this world and in the Hereafter.
I also beseech Him to make me attain the praiseworthy status that you enjoy with Allah

lines.arabic: أنْ يَجْعَلَنِي مَعَكُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
lines.transliteration: an yaj'alani ma'akum fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translations.en: to include me with you in this world and in the Hereafter

lines.arabic: وَأنْ يُثَبِّتَ لِي عِنْدَكُمْ قَدَمَ صِدْقٍ
lines.transliteration: wa an yuthabbita li 'indakum qadama shidqin

translations.en: and to make firm step of honesty for me with you
in this world and in the Hereafter.

lines.arabic: وَأسْألُهُ أنْ يُبَلِّغَنِيَ ٱلْمَقَامَ ٱلْمَحْمُودَ لَكُمْ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ
lines.transliteration: wa as'aluhu an yuballighani almaqama almahmuda lakum 'inda allahi

translations.en: I also beseech Him to make me attain the praiseworthy status that you enjoy with Allah

sections.arabic:
وَأنْ يَرْزُقَنِي طَلَبَ ثَأرِي
مَعَ إِمَامِ هُدىًٰ ظَاهِرٍ
نَاطِقٍ بِٱلْحَقِّ مِنْكُمْ
وَأسْألُ ٱللَّهَ بِحَقِّكُمْ
sections.transliteration:
wa an yarzuqani talaba tha'ri
ma'a imami hudan zahirin
natiqin bilhaqqi minkum
wa as'alu allaha bihaqqikum

translations.en:
and to bestow upon me with the chance to take my own vengeance
with a leader of true guidance who is (Divinely) sustained
and expressing the truth from among you.
I also beseech Allah in your names
and to bestow upon me with the chance to take my own vengeance
with a leader of true guidance who is (Divinely) sustained
and expressing the truth from among you.
I also beseech Allah in your names

sections.arabic:
وَبِٱلشَّأنِ ٱلَّذِي لَكُمْ عِنْدَهُ
أنْ يُعْطِيَنِي بِمُصَابِي بِكُمْ
أفْضَلَ مَا يُعْطِي مُصَاباً بِمُصِيبَتِهِ
مُصِيبَةً مَا أعْظَمَهَا
sections.transliteration:
wa bilshsha'ni alladhi lakum 'indahu
an yu'tiyani bimushabi bikum
afaala ma yu'ti mushaban bimushibatihi
mushibatan ma a'zamaha

translations.en:
and in the name of the standing that you enjoy with Him
to recompense me for my commiserations for you
with the most favorite thing that He ever gives as compensation for misfortunes that has afflicted anyone.
(Your) misfortune has been so astounding
and in the name of the standing that you enjoy with Him
to recompense me for my commiserations for you
with the most favorite thing that He ever gives as compensation for misfortunes that has afflicted anyone.
(Your) misfortune has been so astounding

sections.arabic:
وَأعْظَمَ رَزِيَّتَهَا فِي ٱلإِسْلاَمِ
وَفِي جَمِيعِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلأرْضِ
اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْنِي فِي مَقَامِي هٰذَا
مِمَّنْ تَنَالُهُ مِنْكَ صَلَوَاتٌ وَرَحْمَةٌ وَمَغْفِرَةٌ
sections.transliteration:
wa a'zama raziyyataha fi al-islami
wa fi jami'i alssamawati wal-arai
allahumma ij'alni fi maqami hadha
mimman tanaluhu minka shalawatun wa rahmatun wa maghfiratun

translations.en:
and so catastrophic for Islam
and for all the heavens and the entire earth.
O Allah, (please) make me in this situation of mine
one of those who receive blessings, mercy, and forgiveness from You.
and so catastrophic for Islam
and for all the heavens and the entire earth.
O Allah, (please) make me in this situation of mine

lines.arabic: مِمَّنْ تَنَالُهُ مِنْكَ صَلَوَاتٌ وَرَحْمَةٌ وَمَغْفِرَةٌ
lines.transliteration: mimman tanaluhu minka shalawatun wa rahmatun wa maghfiratun

translations.en: one of those who receive blessings, mercy, and forgiveness from You.

sections.arabic:
اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْ مَحْيَايَ مَحْيَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
وَمَمَاتِي مَمَاتَ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ هٰذَا يَوْمٌ
تَبَرَّكَتْ بِهِ بَنُو أُمَيَّةَ
sections.transliteration:
allahumma ij'al mahyaya mahya muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
wa mamati mamata muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
allahumma inna hadha yawmun
tabarrakat bihi banu umayyata

translations.en:
O Allah, (please) make me live my lifetime in the same way as Muhammad and Muhammads Household lived
and make me die on the same principles on which Muhammad and Mu¦ammads Household died.
O Allah, this day
has been regarded as blessed day by the descendants of Umayyah

lines.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْ مَحْيَايَ مَحْيَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
lines.transliteration: allahumma ij'al mahyaya mahya muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translations.en: O Allah, (please) make me live my lifetime in the same way as Muhammad and Muhammads Household lived

lines.transliteration: wa mamati mamata muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translations.en: and make me die on the same principles on which Muhammad and Mu¦ammads Household died.
O Allah, this day
has been regarded as blessed day by the descendants of Umayyah

sections.arabic:
وَٱبْنُ آكِلَةِ ٱلأكبَادِ
ٱللَّعِينُ ٱبْنُ ٱللَّعِينِ
عَلَىٰ لِسَانِكَ وَلِسَانِ نَبِيِّكَ
صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
sections.transliteration:
wabnu akilati al-akbadi
alla'inu ibnu alla'ini
'ala lisanika wa lisani nabiyyika
shalla allahu 'alayhi wa alihi

translations.en:
and by the son of the liver-eater woman,
the accursed and son of the accursed
by the tongue of You and by the tongue of Your Prophet,
Allahs peace be upon him,
and by the son of the liver-eater woman,
the accursed and son of the accursed
by the tongue of You and by the tongue of Your Prophet,
Allahs peace be upon him,

sections.arabic:
فِي كُلِّ مَوْطِنٍ وَمَوْقِفٍ
وَقَفَ فِيهِ نَبِيُّكَ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
اَللَّهُمَّ ٱلْعَنْ أبَا سُفْيَانَ وَمُعَاوِيَةَ وَيَزيدَ بْنَ مُعَاوِيَةَ
عَلَيْهِمْ مِنْكَ ٱللَّعْنَةُ أبَدَ ٱلآبِدِينَ
sections.transliteration:
fi kulli mawtinin wa mawqifin
waqafa fihi nabiyyuka shalla allahu 'alayhi wa alihi
allahumma il'an aba sufyana wa mu'awiyata wa yazida bna mu'awiyata
'alayhim minka alla'natu abada al-abidina

translations.en:
on every occasion and in every situation,
which Your Prophet, Allahs peace be upon him, attended.
O Allah, pour curses upon Aba-Sufyan, Mu`wiyah, and Yazid son of Mu`awiyah.
May Your curse be upon them incessantly and everlastingly.
on every occasion and in every situation,

lines.arabic: وَقَفَ فِيهِ نَبِيُّكَ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
lines.transliteration: waqafa fihi nabiyyuka shalla allahu 'alayhi wa alihi

translations.en: which Your Prophet, Allahs peace be upon him, attended.

lines.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱلْعَنْ أبَا سُفْيَانَ وَمُعَاوِيَةَ وَيَزيدَ بْنَ مُعَاوِيَةَ
lines.transliteration: allahumma il'an aba sufyana wa mu'awiyata wa yazida bna mu'awiyata

translations.en: O Allah, pour curses upon Aba-Sufyan, Mu`wiyah, and Yazid son of Mu`awiyah.
May Your curse be upon them incessantly and everlastingly.

sections.arabic:
وَهٰذَا يَوْمٌ فَرِحَتْ بِهِ آلُ زِيَادٍ وَآلُ مَرْوَانَ
بِقَتْلِهِمُ ٱلْحُسَيْنَ صَلَوَاتُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ
اَللَّهُمَّ فَضَاعِفْ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱللَّعْنَ مِنْكَ
وَٱلْعَذَابَ (ٱلألِيمَ)
sections.transliteration:
wa hadha yawmun farihat bihi alu ziyadin wa alu marwana
biqatlihim alhusayna shalawatu allahi 'alayhi
allahumma faaa'if 'alayhim alla'na minka
wal'adhaba (al-alima)

translations.en:
This is the day on which the family of Ziyad and the family of Marwan gloated
because they had killed al-Husayn, Allahs blessings be upon him.
So, O Allah, pour frequent curses upon them
and double for them the painful chastisement.

lines.arabic: وَهٰذَا يَوْمٌ فَرِحَتْ بِهِ آلُ زِيَادٍ وَآلُ مَرْوَانَ
lines.transliteration: wa hadha yawmun farihat bihi alu ziyadin wa alu marwana

translations.en: This is the day on which the family of Ziyad and the family of Marwan gloated
because they had killed al-Husayn, Allahs blessings be upon him.
So, O Allah, pour frequent curses upon them
and double for them the painful chastisement.

sections.arabic:
اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ فِي هٰذَا ٱلْيَوْمِ
وَفِي مَوْقِفِي هٰذَا
وَأيَّامِ حَيَاتِي
بِٱلْبَرَاءَةِ مِنْهُمْ وَٱللَّعْنَةِ عَلَيْهِمْ
sections.transliteration:
allahumma inni ataqarrabu ilayka fi hadha alyawmi
wa fi mawqifi hadha
wa ayyami hayati
bilbara'ati minhum walla'nati 'alayhim

translations.en:
O Allah, I do seek nearness to You on this day,
on this occasion,
and on all the days of my lifetime,
by repudiating these and invoking Your curses upon them,

lines.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ فِي هٰذَا ٱلْيَوْمِ
lines.transliteration: allahumma inni ataqarrabu ilayka fi hadha alyawmi

translations.en: O Allah, I do seek nearness to You on this day,
on this occasion,
and on all the days of my lifetime,
by repudiating these and invoking Your curses upon them,

sections.arabic:
وَبِٱلْمُوَالاَةِ لِنَبِيِّكَ وَآلِ نَبِيِّكَ
عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
sections.transliteration:
wa bilmuwalati linabiyyika wa ali nabiyyika
'alayhi wa 'alayhim alssalamu

translations.en:
and by declaring loyalty to Your Prophet and Your Prophets Household,
peace be upon him and them.

lines.transliteration: wa bilmuwalati linabiyyika wa ali nabiyyika

translations.en: and by declaring loyalty to Your Prophet and Your Prophets Household,
peace be upon him and them.
